hero.eyebrow: Building the digital future from Syria
hero.subtitle: We connect Syrian tech talent with regional investment — turning bold visions into sustainable digital products.

about.title: A team of engineers, operators, and partnership builders.
about.body: We were founded on a simple idea — Syria has world-class technical talent and an underserved market. So we built a company that delivers production-grade software and telecom infrastructure for local clients, while making it easier for international partners to invest, hire, and launch from inside Syria.

stats.desc: Projects delivered — from MVPs to telecom network rollouts.
stats.label: Production

stats.desc: Long-term clients across finance, retail, and the public sector.
stats.label: Trust

services.title: Engineering across the full stack
services.sub: Four practices, one delivery model. Cross-functional pods that ship from architecture to production.

web.title: Web Engineering
web.desc: Next.js, distributed systems, design-system-driven product surfaces. Built for performance budgets that matter.

mobile.title: Mobile Platforms
mobile.desc: Native iOS / Android and React Native applications with offline-first architecture and CI-driven release pipelines.

cloud.title: Cloud Infrastructure
cloud.desc: AWS, GCP and Azure landing zones, IaC, Kubernetes, observability and FinOps governance for cost-aware scale.

ai.title: AI & ML Systems
ai.desc: Production LLM pipelines, RAG architectures, fine-tuning, evaluation harnesses and MLOps for measurable impact.

process.title: A delivery model designed for scale
process.sub: From discovery to production, every engagement runs on the same disciplined backbone.

steps.title: Discovery & Architecture
steps.desc: Stakeholder workshops, technical due diligence, system architecture and an executable roadmap.

steps.title: Design & Prototype
steps.desc: Design systems, interaction prototypes and engineering spikes to de-risk before build.

steps.title: Build & Integrate
steps.desc: Cross-functional pods shipping in two-week increments with continuous integration and review.

steps.title: Scale & Operate
steps.desc: Production hardening, observability, SRE on-call and continuous performance tuning.

cookies.message: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyze site traffic.

sections.heading: Information We Collect
sections.body: We collect information you provide directly, such as when you fill out a contact form. This may include your name, email address, and project details. We also automatically collect certain technical data including IP address, browser type, and pages visited.

sections.heading: How We Use Your Information
sections.body: We use the information we collect to respond to your inquiries, improve our services, analyze usage patterns, and comply with legal obligations. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.

sections.heading: Cookies
sections.body: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your browsing experience and gather analytics data. You may disable cookies in your browser settings, though some site features may not function properly as a result.

sections.heading: Data Retention
sections.body: We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy, or as required by law. Contact form submissions are retained for up to 24 months.

sections.heading: Your Rights
sections.body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. To exercise these rights, contact us at hello@solvensyntrix.com. We will respond within 30 days.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.body: For privacy-related questions, contact our team at hello@solvensyntrix.com or write to us at Dubai Internet City, Building 12.

sections.heading: Acceptance of Terms
sections.body: By accessing or using the Solven Syntrix website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.

sections.heading: Services
sections.body: Solven Syntrix provides software engineering, cloud infrastructure, mobile development, and AI/ML systems services. Service scope and deliverables are defined in individual engagement agreements.

sections.heading: Intellectual Property
sections.body: All content on this website including text, graphics, logos, and software is the property of Solven Syntrix and protected by applicable intellectual property laws. Client deliverables are governed by the terms of the relevant project agreement.

sections.heading: Limitation of Liability
sections.body: Solven Syntrix shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our website or services. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount paid for the specific service in question.

sections.heading: Governing Law
sections.body: These terms shall be governed by the laws of the United Arab Emirates. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Dubai.

sections.heading: Changes to Terms
sections.body: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of our services after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms. We recommend reviewing this page periodically.
